blocks.text: Re: Integration Support for Foley Group

Thank you for asking Pinebrook Advisory Group to support the integration now underway at {{fact:f:E-2021-001.client}}. This letter confirms the scope of our work, the team assigned to it, and the commercial terms. If everything here matches your understanding, please sign where indicated and return one copy to my attention.

Our assignment is post-acquisition integration support. We will work alongside your management team to combine operations without losing the customers and the people who made the acquisition worth doing. In practice that means a working integration checklist that we maintain and you may inspect at any time, regular working sessions with your managers, and short written status reports for your desk. We will tell you plainly what is on track, what is behind, and what needs a decision from you.

Jenna Wiley, Principal Consultant, will run the engagement day to day and will be your first call. Jacob Williams, Senior Consultant, will own the integration checklist and the analysis behind it. Lisa Hernandez, Analyst, will support the fieldwork and keep the record of every working session. I stay close to every engagement this firm accepts, and nothing will reach you that I have not read and signed.

Our fee for this work is a fixed {{fact:f:E-2021-001.fee}}, covering all professional time for the engagement. We will begin on {{fact:f:E-2021-001.start}}, and we expect the work to run approximately eight months. If the scope changes along the way, we will raise it with you in writing before we act on it.
We are a small firm by design, and we do not accept work we cannot staff with senior people. Foley Group will have our full attention. We appreciate your confidence, and we look forward to the work.
